_description: Gold standard expected output for: Airline Analysis and Scheduling Solution Application — U.S. Department of Transportation (693JK426R600002)

expected.title: Airline Analysis and Scheduling Solution via a Web-based Application
expected.summary: The U.S. Department of Transportation Office of Aviation Analysis seeks a contractor to provide an airline analysis and scheduling solution via a web-based application tool. The firm-fixed price contract covers one base year and four option years under full and open competition, with best value award basis.

_field_sources.title: Cover letter: 'Airline Analysis and Scheduling Solution via a Web-based Application'

_field_sources.estimatedValueUsd: Not stated in solicitation — should be omitted
